summary: Updated YAML module exports and discovery documentation to reflect the Action rename from Task. Removed parse_task_yaml from public exports (kept as backward compatibility alias in parser only) and updated all docstrings in discovery.py to reference 'actions' directory instead of 'tasks'. All acceptance criteria now pass.
test_summary: All 275 core tests pass (22 discovery tests, 253 other tests). Specific test results: test_discovery.py: 22/22 PASSED. All acceptance criteria verified: (1) parse_task_yaml not exported from phalanx_core.yaml, (2) Action importable from phalanx_core, (3) parse_action_yaml importable from phalanx_core.yaml, (4) discovery.py uses 'actions' directory string not 'tasks', (5) mypy libs/core/src/phalanx_core --strict: Success with no issues in 15 source files.
codebase_learnings: The project uses Pydantic for schema validation (ActionDef, BlockDef, etc. in yaml/schema.py)
YAML parser module (yaml/parser.py) maintains backward compatibility aliases like parse_task_yaml = parse_action_yaml, while __init__.py controls public exports
Discovery system discovers custom blocks, souls, and workflows from directory structure with snake_case ID generation for blocks
Project uses mypy with --strict flag for type checking - all modules must be fully typed
Test directory structure follows pattern: tests/test_<module>.py with class-based test organization (e.g., TestSnakeCaseConversion)
Git commit messages follow pattern: issue/<name>: <description> with detailed explanation in body
The project has been through a recent refactoring from 'Task' to 'Action' terminology across multiple files and commits

what_worked_well: Methodical exploration of codebase before making changes to understand the structure
Clear understanding of the rename refactoring from previous commits
Comprehensive testing strategy - ran existing tests to ensure no regressions
Verification of all acceptance criteria before and after changes
Small, focused changes that addressed exactly what was needed
improvements_for_next_time: Could have checked if there were any other files importing parse_task_yaml from the yaml module
Could have looked for any test files that might import parse_task_yaml specifically
key_insights: The backward compatibility alias parse_task_yaml is kept in parser.py but not exported via __init__.py, which is the right approach for deprecation
The discovery.py module has a well-documented expected directory structure that needed updating for consistency
All changes were purely in exports and documentation - no code logic changes needed
